files.description: Files changed in this PR with descriptions.

description.description: Short description of what changed in this file.

body.description: Why this matters and concrete fix guidance.

confidence_score.description: Confidence that this finding is a real issue (0.0 to 1.0). Range enforced at runtime; minimum/maximum omitted because the structured output API does not support them.

line.description: Changed line on the RIGHT side of the diff.

priority.description: Priority level: 0 = critical, 1 = correctness, 2 = maintainability, 3 = minor. Range enforced at runtime; minimum/maximum omitted because the structured output API does not support them.

reasoning.description: Chain-of-thought explanation: what you observed, why it is a problem, and what the impact is. Written before deciding priority and confidence.

start_line.description: First line when a suggestion spans multiple consecutive lines. Must be <= line. Null when not applicable.

suggestion.description: Exact replacement code for lines start_line..line. Null when the fix is non-trivial or ambiguous.

overall_confidence_score.description: Confidence in the overall correctness verdict (0.0 to 1.0). Range enforced at runtime; minimum/maximum omitted because the structured output API does not support them.

summary.description: 1-5 sentence description of what the PR changes and why.
